titleStmt.title: SII 36.94: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 94. (A.R. No. 94 of 1910.) TIRUMĀḶAM (Kōviltirumāḷam), NANNILAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT. On the west wall of the central shrine in the Māgāḷēśvara temple.

summary.p: The inscription is incomplete. Records an oral order of the king issued at the request of Nuḷambarājaṉ, while present in the western hall, Rājēndrachōḻaṉ in his palace at Muḍigoṇḍa Chōḻapuram. The land measuring more than 13 (3/4)th vēlis, after deducting the non-taxable land in the village Puravuvari-viḷāgam, a dēvadāṉa of the temple, Ambar Tirumāgālam, in the Ambar-nāḍu, a subdivision of Uyyakkoṇḍar-vaḷanāḍu, was granted as kāṇi to Tiruchchiṟṟambalamuḍaiyāṉ alias Tiruchchiṟṟambala Nandirājaṉ, the Vēlāṉ of Māttūr and his descendants. The oral order of the king was conveyed by the Tirumandira-ōlai and the official order (uḷvari) was issued over the signatures of Puravuvari-nāyagam and Mugaveṭṭi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa ṉilamakaḷ vaḷara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟanta maṇimuṭi cūṭi mīṉavar ṉilai keṭa villavar kulaitara Eṉai maṉ
ṉavaririyalūṟṟiḻitarat tikkaṉaittun taṉ cakkaranaṭātti vīra saṉattu Avaṉimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya korājakecaripaṉmarāṉa cak
karavarttikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatēvaṟku yāṇṭu nāṟpattiraṇṭāvatu ... muṭikoṇṭa coḻapurattu koyiliṉuḷḷāl Āṭṭattu veḷi
melaimaṇṭapam rājentaracoḻaṉil vāṇātirājaṉil Eḻuntaruḷi Iruntu ceyyat tiruvāy moḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu Ampar ṉāṭ
ṭu Ampart tirumākāḷamuṭaiyār tevatāṉam puravuvariviḷākam yāṇṭu nāṟpat tiraṇṭāvatu mutal mātturuṭaiyāṉ veḷāṉ tirucciṟṟampalamu
ṭaiyāṉāṉa tirucciṟṟampala nantarājaṉukkum Ivar vaṟkattārkkuṅ kāṇiyākak kuṭukkaveṇṭu Eṉṟu nuḷamparājan namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ivvūr A
ḷanteṟiṉa ṉilam Uṭpaṭa Ivaṉukkum Ivaṉ vaṟkattārkkume kāṇiyākak kuṭuttom Ippaṭikku nam Ōlaiyum namvariilār Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvariyum Ikkā
ṇiyāḷaṉukkup peṟumpaṭi kūṟaiyum pokak kāṭṭik kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭik koḷka veṉṟu tiruvāymoḻintaruḷa tirumantira Ōlai mīṉavan
bramārāyaṉ Eḻuttiṉāl pukunta ceyyum paṭippaṭiyālum meṟpaṭiyāṉ Eḻuttiṉāl yāṇṭu nāṟpattiraṇṭāvatu nāḷ Irupatiṉāl vanta tirumukap
paṭiyum puravuvariṉāyakam ṉāṅkoṟṟaṉum kūttaṉūr Uṭaiyāṉum karuppūruṭaiyāṉum koṭṭuruṭaiyāṉum mukaveṭṭi ṭaiyā
ṉum marutaṅkiḻāṉum veḷūr kiḻavaṉum(m) Eḻuttiṭṭu vanta Uḷvarippaṭi yāṇṭu nāṟpattiraṇṭāvatu māttūruṭaiyāṉ veḷā
ṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉāṉa tirucciṟṟampala nantirājaṉukkum Ivaṉ vaṟkat tārkkuṅ kāṇiyāka Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu Am
parayanāṭṭu Ampart tirumākāḷamuṭaiyār tevatāṉam puravuvari viḷākam tiru Ulakaḷanteṟiṉa nilam Uṭpaṭa nilam patināṟaraiye nālu mā
Itil maṭaiviḷākattālun taḷicceriyālun tevaraṭiyār teruvālum maṭaṅkaḷālum tirunantavaṉaṅkaḷālum paṇi makkaḷ kuṭi Irup(pa)pālu
ṉīṅku ṉilam Iraṇṭe mukkāle mūṉṟu mā muntirikai ṉīkki ṉilam patin mūṉ ṟey mukkāle mukkāṇi Araikkāṇi muṉtirikaiyu
m Ivaṉukkuk kāṇiyāka niccayitta Eṇṇūṟṟaṟupattaṟu kalam
Digital edition of SII 36.94 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
